protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: cultures aliquoted and exposed to various detergents...at 37 C for 2 hrs; cell debris removed by centrifugation at 4500xg for 30 min

protocols.Paper_title: Integrating the affinity and anion-exchange purification of AAV8: how the selective enrichment of full capsids at the affinity capture step enhances the downstream processing of gene therapies
protocols.Evidence: lysates prepared with Triton X-100, Deviron 13-S9, and sodium deoxycholate; 0.25% w/v CTAB; salt-only conditions (NaCl, KCl)
